S.FORM: Irv Bemoras sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 11, Irv Bemoras, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ir* Œ≤emoras~…ï s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, ir* Œ≤emoras~…ï, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
